articles.title: EQT Recycles Azelis Gains Into Tech And Real Assets Growth Platforms
articles.summary: EQT has fully exited its remaining stake in Azelis Group after a seven year investment period. The firm is seeking full ownership of South Korean software company Douzone Bizon through a tender offer. EQT is also involved in data center projects and has secured commitments for new logistics focused funds.
